app_subtitle: Civic transparency platform for Colombian public procurement
phase_1_desc: ML risk semaphore on live SECOP II contracts. Identifies atypical patterns intelligently.
phase_2_desc: Contractor network linked to campaign finance (Cuentas Claras). Interactive graph connecting donors to contracts.
phase_3_desc: Automatic verification of electoral promises with NLP. Compares promises against contract execution.
map_subtitle: Average algorithmic risk computed at the department level.
ethical_disclaimer: ⚖️ Ethical notice: This analysis is for informational purposes only. A high risk score does not imply corruption, it signals that the contract warrants greater civic scrutiny. Always consult official sources at SECOP II.
methodology_features: 25 features extracted from SECOP II data
methodology_update: Model retrained weekly with updated data
no_contracts_found: No contracts found matching the selected filters.
error_loading: Error loading data. Please try again.
footer_text: VeedurIA. Open source under MIT license.
home_hero_title: The most suspicious contract in your department, in real time.
home_hero_subtitle: VeedurIA uses AI to analyze millions of SECOP II contracts. Detects anomalies, explains why, and links you directly to the official source.
home_developed_by: Developed by Daniel Steven Rodríguez Sandoval
ml_calculating: Risk scores are still being computed. Please refresh this page in a few minutes.
map_calculating_msg: The map will be available once risk scores per department are computed. Run the scoring pipeline and reload this page.
select_contract_hint: Select a contract from the table above to view its details.
preview_banner: Quick view with {shown} recent contracts out of {total} total. Use the button below to load the full history.
explanation_template: This contract shows {n} atypical indicators. {factors}. Risk score: {score}/100.
factor_advance_payment: Advance payment represents {pct}% of the contract value (legal limit: 50%)
factor_price_ratio: Value is {x}× higher than the entity's historical average for this modality
factor_single_bidder: Process awarded to a single bidder
factor_ley_garantias: Direct award during restriction period (Ley de Garantías)
value_prop_detect_body: Isolation Forest analyzes 25 variables per contract and detects atypical patterns in real time.
value_prop_explain_body: SHAP reveals the exact factors elevating each contract's risk score, in plain language.
value_prop_verify_body: Every alert includes a direct link to the official contract in SECOP II so you can verify it yourself.
risk_highlights_title: Contracts with the highest risk indicators
risk_highlights_national: Top contracts by risk score — nationwide
risk_highlights_dept: Top contracts by risk score in {dept}
risk_highlights_empty: No high-risk contracts found for this department.
risk_highlights_empty_national: No contracts with computed risk scores found. Run the scoring pipeline.
map_click_hint: Click a department to filter the highest-risk contracts
map_filtered_warning: Only {n} department(s) visible. Remove the department filter to see the national map.
insight_sentence: 🔴 {dept} accounts for {pct}% of active red flags
